allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK', len\(app.routes\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; from app.ai.position_spec_generator import generate_position_spec_payload; from app.ai.candidate_profile_parser import parse_candidate_profile; from app.ai.openai_client import get_openai_client; from app.core.config import settings; print\('routes:', len\(app.routes\)\); print\('openai_enabled:', settings.openai_enabled\); print\('model:', settings.openai_model\); print\('client:', type\(get_openai_client\(\)\).__name__\)")
